CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL( Calc_Unit__c ,"Size"),
IF(ISNULL( Qty_On_Hand_Roll__c ),0,
Qty_On_Hand_Roll__c ) * Total_Cost_Each__c ,
IF( ISPICKVAL(Calc_Unit__c ,"Each"),
( Qty_On_Hand__c * ( IF(ISNULL( Price_Per_Unit__c ),0,Price_Per_Unit__c ) )) ,
IF(ISPICKVAL(Calc_Unit__c ,"Sheet"),
( Qty_On_Hand_Case__c * ( IF(ISNULL( Price_Per_Case__c ),0,Price_Per_Case__c )))
,null)))
CustomField.label: Cost of Inventory
